# Runestone

Runestone is a playable statechart explainer for software engineers. It maps a
five-room 3D dungeon to an executable XState machine and displays the active
state, transitions, guards, context, and actors while the user plays.

## Primary pages

- [Runestone](https://runestone.teeldinho.com/): Product explanation, concepts,
  controls, and entry to the run.
- [Source](https://github.com/Teeldinho/runestone): Implementation and project
  documentation.
